texts.full_text: and alternative therapies in childhood attention and hyperactivity problems. To determine the prevalence and factors associated with complementary and alternative medicine (CAM) use for childhood attention and hyperactivity problems, we surveyed parents of children referred for evaluation of attention-deficit hyperactivity disorder (ADHD). texts.full_text: aim of the study was to monitor the metabolism of drug direct and continuously by EPR. The results indicated that the EPR technique was effective in monitoring the metabolism of the drug. The study found that the EPR technique provided real-time and non-invasive monitoring of the drug's metabolism, which could be valuable for understanding the pharmacokinetics and pharmacodynamics of the drug. The results also suggested that EPR could be used to optimize drug delivery systems and to assess the effectiveness of therapeutic interventions. Overall, the study highlighted the potential of EPR as a valuable tool in the field of pharmaco

texts.full_text: turned to the United States and attended Harvard University, where he graduated in 1787. After completing his education, he went on to study law and waS admitted to the bar in 1790. His early career included working as a lawyer and a diplomat, serving in various roles such as minister to the Netherlands, minister to Prussia, and senator from Massachusetts. These experiences would ultimately shape his future political ambitions and prepare him

texts.full_text: Change Takes Its Toll On Central American Coffee Industry Introductory paragraph: Central American coffee farmers are facing an increasingly uncertain future as climate change begins to take its toll. Rising temperatures and changes in rainfall patterns are making it difficult for farmers to produce crops, and the industry is beginning to feel the effects. Body paragraph: This is having a ripple effect on the economies of Central America, as coffee is an important export crop. In addition, the livelihoods of millions of people who depend on the coffee industry are being threatened. System: Give me a succinct summary of the text’s content.
